description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring a dark brown wooden seat and backrest, supported by robust metal legs and frame. The seat consists of three wide wooden planks, while the backrest is made up of two horizontal wooden slats, each with visible bolt holes for secure attachment. The metal supports are painted a dark color and curve gently to provide both stability and a modern aesthetic. The bench is designed to comfortably seat multiple people and is elevated by four metal legs that are likely anchored to the ground for added security. The overall construction suggests durability and resistance to outdoor elements, making it suitable for parks, sidewalks, or public spaces. The absence of armrests gives it a minimalist and accessible design.
description: A dark brown wooden bench with a slatted seat and backrest, supported by curved metal legs. Designed for outdoor use, it is sturdy and minimalist, lacking armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, with three seat planks and two backrest slats clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the curved metal supports beneath the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the four metal legs, with all support structures visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the seat depth and the alignment of the metal supports.
